@@ -0,0 +1,34 @@
+/**
+ * Plugins System - ADR-004 Implementation
+ *
+ * Plugin architecture for extending Claude Flow functionality.
+ *
+ * @module v3/shared/plugins
+ */
+
+// Types
+export type {
+  PluginConfig,
+  PluginContext,
+  PluginEvent,
+  PluginEventHandler,
+  ClaudeFlowPlugin,
+  PluginMetadata,
+  IPluginRegistry,
+  IPluginLoader,
+} from './types.js';
+
+// Official Plugins
+export {
+  HiveMindPlugin,
+  createHiveMindPlugin,
+  type HiveMindConfig,
+  type CollectiveDecision,
+  type EmergentPattern,
+  MaestroPlugin,
+  createMaestroPlugin,
+  type MaestroConfig,
+  type WorkflowStep,
+  type Workflow,
+  type OrchestrationResult,
+} from './official/index.js';
